brand-card-stack.label: Brand Card Stack
brand-card-stack.description: Interactive stacked media layout with one featured asset and supporting images or videos. Scroll-driven animation spreads cards out; the featured asset can expand to full-screen. Typically used as a hero-scale brand moment on landing pages.

slots.name: cards
slots.description: 5–8 child elements (5 minimum enforced by the component, 8 recommended max). Exactly one must have `data-featured="true"` — this can be a video element (all others should be still images in that case). Others can be img or containers wrapping an img.

attrs.name: data-featured
attrs.description: Applied to ONE child element inside the cards slot (not the host) to mark it as the featured asset. Required — component will not render correctly without it.

attrs.name: data-image-expand
attrs.description: Full-screen expand is ON by default. Set to `"false"` to disable the full-screen takeover; the scroll-spread animation still plays.

image_dimensions.notes: Applies to both featured and supporting assets.

brand-card-stack.notes: Hard minimum of 5 assets (component logs a warning and renders empty if fewer). Recommended count is 5–6; supports up to 8. Video supported only as the featured element; all other slots should be still images.

brand-logo-animation.label: Brand Chevron Animation
brand-logo-animation.description: Animated UMD chevron logo scroll element. Drop-in decorative brand motion — no slots or attributes.
brand-logo-animation.notes: Pure behavior component. Typically placed between sections as a scroll transition.
